Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand And For An Award For Monetary Sanctions In The Amt. Of $2813.00 As To Defts Hinton, Alferts, & Sumner, And Richard Katz, Esq.; Request To Take Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -
DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand And For An Award For Monetary Sanctions In The Amt. Of $2813.00 As To Defts Hinton, Alferts, & Sumner, And Richard Katz, Esq.; - OFF CALENDAR TO BE RENOTICED IN DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620

Correction To Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand & For An Award For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2813.00 As To Defts Hinton, Alfert & Sumner, & Richard Katz (Set In Error For 12/13/05; Moving Papers Is For Dec-19-2005, 9:00 Am)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Bank of the West's Motion To Compel Defendants Hinton, Alfert & Sumner, and Richard Katz, Esq. To Make Further Responses To Inspection Demand is Granted in part and denied in part.
As to the retainer and fee agreement, Defendants Hinton, Alfert & Sumner, and Richard Katz, Esq. are ordered to produce. As to the itemization and summary of costs, Defendants Hinton, Alfert & Sumner, and Richard Katz, Esq. are ordered to produce the documents, redacting work product as the documents describe the work done. As to the invoices, bills and receipts, Defendants Hinton, Alfert & Sumner, and Richard Katz, Esq. are ordered to produce the documents, redacting work product as the documents describe the work done.
Further production shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
